name: Melitzanes Katsarolas Voutirou (Potted Eggpl
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds Tomatoes, peeled and strained OR
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the eggplants and cut into 1 1/2-inch cubes.
2. Soak the cubes in lightly salted water for 15 minutes.
3. Drain and gently squeeze out excess liquid.
4. In a large pot, brown the butter over medium heat until golden.
5. Add the eggplant cubes and turn occasionally to brown evenly on all sides.
6. Add minced garlic and cook until golden.
7. Stir in chopped parsley, diced tomatoes (or tomato paste with water), salt, and pepper.
8. Pour in 1 cup of water and cover the pot.
9. Simmer over low heat for 30 to 45 minutes, or until all liquid is absorbed and only the oil remains.
